name: ternary_with_self_referential_shift
description: Code should include a ternary expression where the same variable is used both as the condition and as the shift amount for a bitwise shift operation, creating a combinational loop that causes infinite recursion in XAIGER backend.

name: variable_shift_in_ternary_condition
description: Code should include a ternary where a register variable controls both the condition and the shift amount, with the shift result used in a case statement that assigns back to the register.

name: non_zero_indexed_register_in_feedback
description: Code should include a reg variable with non-zero based index (e.g., [2:7]) used in a feedback pattern within an always @(*) block, where the register reads and writes occur in the same always block.
snippet:
reg [2:7] e;

always @(*) begin
    case (e ? b << e : 0)
        'd67: begin
            e = c;
        end
    endcase
end
